headline: Assessing Labcorp Holdings (LH) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Labcorp Holdings at a Glance Labcorp Holdings (LH) has been drawing attention after recent share price moves, with the stock showing a 0.4% decline on the day and negative returns over the past week and month. Over the past 3 months, the stock has recorded a 5.8% decline, while the year to date performance is slightly positive at 1.7%. Over the past year, total return stands at 4.4%. headline: Labcorp Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Labcorp (NYSE:LH) reported first-quarter 2026 results management described as a “strong start” to the year, citing revenue growth, margin expansion, and progress across strategic priorities in diagnostics, biopharma laboratory services, specialty testing, consumer health, and technology initiatives.
